subject: NTTT Analytics Backend - READY TO TEST
body:
Hey Compas,

Good news - nttt-functions backend is working!

## TEST Environment - LIVE

**Base URL**: `https://nttt-functions-test-deeyfxhnbgfudghu.eastus-01.azurewebsites.net`

### Endpoints Ready

| Endpoint | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `GET /api/nttt/health` | Health check |
| `GET /api/nttt/users/{userId}/analytics/orchestras` | Orchestra stats |
| `GET /api/nttt/users/{userId}/analytics/singers` | Singer stats |
| `GET /api/nttt/users/{userId}/analytics/recommendations` | Study recommendations |
| `GET /api/nttt/users/{userId}/analytics/grid?gameType=X` | Grid cell stats |

### Firebase
- TEST uses `nttttest` Firebase project
- PROD will use `ntttprod` Firebase project

### Example Response
```json
{
  "userId": "test-user",
  "orchestraStats": [],
  "totalOrchestrasPlayed": 0,
  "strongOrchestras": 0,
  "needsWorkOrchestras": 0,
  "weakOrchestras": 0,
  "topConfusions": []
}
```

## Your Side

I see your changes are committed (26a43cd8). Once you push to TEST, the full pipeline will be live:

1. NTTT saves `correctOrchestra`/`userGuess` to Firestore
2. nttt-functions reads from Firestore and computes analytics
3. STATS page calls nttt-functions endpoints

## PROD

Deploying now. Will be ready shortly.

-- Fulton
